retry_reason: If no matching ACPI device exists for the given HID/UID, it will not appear later; retrying will not change the result.
contract_summary: This function is a get-wrapper that obtains a reference to an ACPI device matching the HID and UID derived from the APMT node associated with the given CSPMU device. It returns a pointer to the acpi_device with its reference count incremented, transferring ownership to the caller. The caller must call acpi_dev_put() to release the reference when done. If the APMT node is missing, not of type ACPI, or no matching ACPI device exists, it returns NULL, and the caller must handle the error appropriately.
